strongestIdea: A motion-first GPT Image 2 production probe packet for threshold-keeper Otis, tuned to CharacterStage so each static pose stays readable under idle breathing, greeting nod, listening lean, thinking pause, talking pulse, alert emphasis, working focus, and reduced-motion freeze.
uniquenessClaim: This lane stress-tests the brief at the runtime layer: it argues that Otis sprites should be restrained, centered, and identity-rich because CharacterStage already supplies subtle transform motion. It also converts prior 4K/alpha failures into a concrete probe order and QA guard before the full 21-slot pack is attempted.
qualityRisks: No image files were generated by this lane, so no visual source preflight or app screenshot QA was possible.
The known blocker from earlier probes remains: generated sources must prove native 4096px-long-edge output and true alpha before production ingest.
Identity drift remains likely if the full 21-slot pose pack is generated as independent one-offs without continuity review.
Listening, talking, and alert poses can easily become over-animated in the illustration and fight CharacterStage runtime transforms.
fallbackReason: The requested GPT-5.5 fast mode with extra-high reasoning was not exposed as a selectable profile in this environment.
promotionBlockers: Prompts and motion rules only; no generated sprite source files exist from this lane.
No preflight.json was created because no images were generated or inspected.
Native 4K true-alpha source output remains unproven for GPT Image 2.
Coordinator must run image preflight, dark/light QA, app-scale CharacterStage preview, and final approval before any promotion.
No public/art promotion is authorized from this lane.
